title: Document Checklist: Work Permit (Applied outside Canada) [IMM 5488] - Canada.ca
content:
## Document Checklist: Work Permit (Applied outside Canada) [IMM 5488]

## Download the checklist
Document Checklist: Work Permit (Applied outside Canada) [IMM 5488] (PDF, 2.7 MB)

### How to download, save and open this form
- Use your computer. The form may not open on tablets or mobile phones .
- Save the form on your computer in a place you can remember. For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form. If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form.
- If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- After you download the form, open it using Adobe Acrobat Reader.

#### Open this form in Acrobat Reader
- Open Acrobat Reader. You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms. Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms.
- Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- Select “ File ” from the top menu.
- Find the location where you saved the form, click on the file, and click “ Open. ”

## Complete the checklist

### How to use and submit this checklist
- As you gather documents and complete forms, check the boxes beside each item.
- If you’re submitting a paper application: When you put together your application package, place your documents and forms in the order shown on the checklist. Place the completed checklist on top of your application package before mailing it.
- When you put together your application package, place your documents and forms in the order shown on the checklist.
- Place the completed checklist on top of your application package before mailing it.
- If you’re applying online: When you start applying, a personalized document checklist will be created. You do not need to submit this PDF checklist. It is only used to help you complete your application.
- When you start applying, a personalized document checklist will be created.
- You do not need to submit this PDF checklist. It is only used to help you complete your application.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
